query: Farha: Wishlist and gifting app alternative

results.title: 7 Best Amazon Wishlist Alternatives in 2026 (That Work With Any Store) | Farha
results.content:
Farha is a universal wishlist app that works with any online store. Paste a product URL and the app auto-fetches the image, title, and price. This is the exact functionality Amazon Assistant used to provide, but Farha adds features Amazon never had: anonymous gift reservations, group gifting, real-time gift updates, and multilingual support in English, French, and Arabic.

Key features:

Why it replaces Amazon Wishlist: Farha does everything Amazon Assistant used to do (save items from any store) plus everything Amazon Wishlist never did (reservations, group gifting, real-time gift updates). Learn more about how Farha works.

Limitation: Farha is a newer app with a smaller user base compared to established platforms. The community is growing but not yet in the millions. [...] ## 6. Listful -- Best for AI recommendations

Listful is a newer wishlist app that uses AI to suggest gifts based on your lists and browsing patterns. It combines universal wishlist functionality with smart recommendations.

Key features:

Why it replaces Amazon Wishlist: Amazon had product recommendations within its ecosystem. Listful brings AI recommendations across all stores, so suggestions are not limited to what Amazon sells.

Limitation: Newer app with a smaller user base. Some features require a premium subscription. Limited gifting coordination compared to dedicated gifting apps.

results.title: Farha vs. WishApp (2026 Comparison) - WishApp
results.content:
WishApp Logo
WishApp Logo

# Farha vs. WishApp (2026 Comparison)

Farha compared with WishApp, two wishlist apps side by side

Farha is a brand-new wishlist app from a solo founder, built around occasions and a few features WishApp doesn't have. Here is how the two stack up on price, the devices you can use, and the gifting tools that decide which one sticks.

Last updated: June 2026

Looking for a Farha alternative? Farha is a free, very new app with two real standouts: 24/7 price drop alerts and group gifting that WishApp doesn't match. But it's iOS-only today, with no Android and no browser extension. WishApp runs everywhere and is proven. Among Farha alternatives, WishApp is the one we'd pick.

## Feature comparison [...] ### Gifting and group features

Farha and WishApp split this one. Farha has two things WishApp doesn't: group gifting, where several people pool money toward one big item, and thank-you notes you send after the gift arrives. Both are thoughtful. WishApp goes wider instead, with collaborative lists where a couple can co-manage one wishlist, a follow system, a discover feed, and full reserved-and-received tracking with a note like 'from Sarah'. Both name Secret Santa as an occasion, but neither draws names automatically yet.

### Ease of use and trust [...] ### Sharing, privacy and reservations

Both apps get the core right. Share a list with one link, and friends open it in a browser with no account needed. Both hide reservations so the owner never sees who claimed what, which is the whole point of a gift list. Farha adds a nice touch here: it supports Arabic with full right-to-left layout, plus French, which very few wishlist apps bother with. WishApp answers with QR codes, all currencies, and a wider language reach on web, but no Arabic. For a MENA or francophone family, Farha is genuinely the friendlier option.

### Gifting and group features

results.title: 6 Best Wishlist Apps for Couples in 2026 (Tested and ... - Farha
results.content:
In Farha, no. Secret reservations hide claimed items from the wishlist owner. Other apps with this feature include Giftster and CoupleWish. Amazon Wishlist does not support this — gift givers can reveal themselves by accident.

Farha lets anyone view and reserve gifts from a shared link using a web browser — no app download or account needed for the viewer. Most other wishlist apps require both parties to sign up.

Farha supports English, French, and Arabic with full RTL layout — the only wishlist app with Arabic support. Giftful supports 9 European languages but does not include Arabic. [...] Yes. Farha, CoupleWish, and Giftster all work for year-round couple gifting — birthdays, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, or spontaneous gifts. Wedding-specific apps like MyRegistry are overkill for casual use and feel formal outside of formal events.

### 7 Best Free Wishlist Apps in 2026 (Honest Comparison)

10 min read [...] ## 6. Moonsift, best for visual shoppers

Moonsift is a browser extension-first wishlist tool that saves items visually as they appear on the product page. If you both shop heavily through browser browsing rather than apps, Moonsift creates a clean, image-heavy wishlist. Privacy controls let you set lists as private or public, and sharing is simple.

The tradeoff is that Moonsift is not built for gifting coordination — there are no anonymous reservations, no group gifting, and no duplicate prevention. It's a wishlist tool, not a gift coordination tool. For couples who just want a shared reference of things they'd like, it works. For active gift coordination, you'll hit its limits quickly.

### Pros

results.title: 7 Best Wishlist Apps to Share with Friends in 2026 (No Duplicates, No Drama) | Farha
results.content:
Yes. Farha's group gifting feature lets multiple friends each contribute a portion toward one item on your list. It's completely free — no premium tier required. Giftwhale also offers a split-payment group gifting feature on its free plan.

10 min read [...] For a pooled group gift on a big item: Giftwhale or Farha. Both support group contributions. Farha adds the advantage of no-account viewing for friends outside the core group.

For friends in different countries or Arabic-speaking groups: Farha is the only option with Arabic and RTL support. No other app covers MENA-region stores or languages.

For a quick, no-frills birthday list: Things To Get Me. Simple and free — no coordination features, but easy for a friend to open and see at a glance.

Read more: Complete guide to organizing group gifts

## Frequently asked questions [...] The gifting coordination features are minimal. There are no anonymous reservations, no group gifting, and no duplicate prevention. Moonsift is excellent for communicating aesthetic preferences — "here's the kind of thing I like" — but it doesn't handle the coordination side of friend-group gifting. Pair it with a coordination tool if you need both.

### Pros

 Beautiful image-driven wishlist layout
 Strong privacy controls (private or public per list)
 Works across any store
 Good browser extension for quick saving

### Cons

 No anonymous reservations — surprises are not protected
 No group gifting
 Requires accounts for active collaboration
 Not a gifting coordination tool

### Pricing

Free basic tier. Premium for additional features.

results.content:

October 24, 2024

I really like this app as an alternative to an Amazon wishlist since the option to add off-site items no longer exist. That being said, one thing I found that I do not care for us when you choose a color option of an item then add it, it doesn't add a link to the color option so it leaves opportunity to to gift someone the wrong thing. I mean sure, you can add it in the description, which is what I've done, but it's not an ideal situation because someone may overlook that detail.

46 people found this review helpful

October 28, 2024 [...] Get gifts right, every time. Make and share wish lists in a family group you create - for birthdays, Christmas holiday, baby, and weddings.  
  
Unlike other wish list apps here on Google Play, Giftster makes your whole family's gift giving experiences more fun and less stressful.  
  
Only with Giftster can you invite family members to join a private group you create.   
  
Everyone can view and shop each other's wish lists all in one place, discovering gifts and marking things purchased to avoid duplicate gifts. Gift status is hidden from the list maker, keeping the surprise. [...] arrow\_forward
